headline: AGI Cuts Q2 Production Outlook on Young-Davidson Operational Hurdles
summary: Alamos Gold cuts its Q2 output view after Young-Davidson seismic events, downtime and lower grades, while Island Gold is expected to support H2'26 production.

headline: Nucor Projects Earnings to Increase in Q2 on Higher Prices
summary: NUE sees Q2 EPS rising sharply from Q1 and year-ago levels, with segment gains, pricing strength and shareholder returns in focus.

headline: STLD Expects Q2 Earnings to Rise on Solid Demand & Higher Steel Prices
summary: Steel Dynamics sees Q2 EPS rising sharply on stronger steel and aluminum profits, despite a write-down tied to moving a planned recycled slab center.

headline: Albemarle (ALB) Stock Could Be 24.6% Undervalued As Cash Flow Improves
summary: Albemarle (ALB) is back on investors’ radars after recent share price swings, with the stock now around $160.35. The move has sharpened focus on performance, valuation signals, and underlying fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Albemarle. Over the past year, Albemarle has offered a very strong 1 year total shareholder return of 173.60%, even though the 3 year total shareholder return declined 25.71% and the 5 year total shareholder return is a modest 2.53%.
